publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-01-05 18:05:08 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, research materials, legal documents, photographs, newspapers.
did.abstract: Correspondence, notes, outlines, typewritten and photo copies of newspaper articles, directories, court and census records, clippings, photographic prints and negatives, and other items used in the writing of Wright's histories of the New York State Agricultural College at Ovid, New York, the New York Central College at McGraw, New York, and the People's College at Havana (now Montour Falls) New York, as they pertained to the early history of Cornell University. Also sources pertaining to Wright's study of Sullivan's Expedition in New York State.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, notes, outlines, typewritten and photo copies of newspaper articles, directories, court and census records, clippings, photographic prints and negatives, and other items used in the writing of Wright's histories of the New York State Agricultural College at Ovid, New York, the New York Central College at McGraw, New York, and the People's College at Havana (now Montour Falls) New York, as they pertained to the early history of Cornell University. Also, notes, transcripts from contemporary journals, narratives, autobiographies, orderly books, muster rolls, and other sources pertaining to Wright's study of Sullivan's Expedition in New York State, 1779.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Albert Hazen Wright research materials, #1692. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Education (Higher) -- New York (State) -- Montour Falls.
Education (Higher) -- New York (State) -- Ovid.
Education (Higher) -- New York (State) -- McGraw.
Sullivan\'s Indian Campaign, 1779.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State Agricultural College (Ovid, N.Y.)

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid for materials that were part of collection #1998.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.
